summary: All bug fixes verified: 1) Edit form shows correct making charge labels (% Making vs Per Gram), 2) BillPage shows percentage+₹/g only for percentage type, only ₹/g for per_gram type, 3) Navigation loop fixed with replace:true - back from Edit Item goes to Bill, not looping
passed_tests: Edit form for PERCENTAGE making charge shows '% Making' label with value 15
Edit form for PERCENTAGE type shows helper text '15% ₹978.26/g' below input
Edit form for PER_GRAM making charge shows 'Per Gram (Rs.)' label with value 500
BillPage (d70d822e): Percentage type item shows 'Making: 15.0% ₹978g' format
BillPage (880c3622): Per gram type item shows 'Making: ₹500/g' - NO percentage
BillPage (880c3622): Bill Summary shows 'Ring: ₹500/g' - NO percentage
Navigation: Edit Item → Back goes to Bill page
Navigation: NO LOOP - Bill → Back never returns to Edit Item
Navigation: Bill → Back (multiple) eventually reaches Dashboard
Navigation: Save/Update Item returns to Bill page with replace:true
critical_code_review_comments: BillPage.js getMakingPercent() at line 79-82: Correctly returns percentage only for type==='percentage', null otherwise
ItemCalculator.js line 290,316-320: replace:true used on both save and back navigation to prevent history piling
Making charge label logic at ItemCalculator.js line 523: Shows '% Making' for percentage, 'Per Gram (Rs.)' for per_gram

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page, fill credentials, click 'Sign In as Admin'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 making charge fixes verified: (1) Edit form labels show '% Making' vs 'Per Gram (Rs.)' correctly based on type; (2) BillPage shows 'X% ₹Y/g' for percentage type, only '₹Y/g' for per_gram type; (3) Navigation loop fixed with replace:true - Bill->Edit->Back->Bill->Back never loops to Edit. Test bills: 880c3622 (per_gram ₹500/g), d70d822e (percentage 15%)

navigation_loop_prevention.test_flow: Dashboard → Bill → Edit Item → Back → Bill → Back → Dashboard
navigation_loop_prevention.implementation: ItemCalculator uses replace:true for back and save navigation
navigation_loop_prevention.notes: First back from Bill may stay on Bill (history replacement behavior), but never loops to Edit Item

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual delivery
